title: sida bilobulata
intro: Sida bilobulata, also known as the two-lobed sida or Chinese joyperch, is a plant species native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Sida bilobulata include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Sida bilobulata is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, or tinctures.
